query: Great Nordeen cross country ski race Mt. Bachelor to Wanoga Sno Park

videos.title: Great Nordeen XC Ski Race coming up
videos.description: The MBSEF Great Nordeen is the largest Cross Country race in Central Oregon.  The Sunday, Jan. 2h event runs from Mt. Bachelor to Wanoga Snow Park on Deschutes National Forest trails.   | Read more: https://ktvz.com
videos.transcript:
here's some more local sports news if
you're looking for a big cross-country
ski event this month the 20th annual
great nordine ski race and Fat Tire Bike
Race happens on the 29th of Mount
Bachelor it's a benefit for the Mount
Bachelor Sports Education Foundation
there are two races a 30k and an 18K
Nordic The Fat Tire Bike Race is a 15K
event you can register for the event
online at mbfcf.org

videos.title: The annual Great Nordeen nordic ski race
videos.description: The Great Nordeen ski race featured a 18k and a 30k ski race that started at Mt. Bachelor's West Village parking lot and finished at Wanoga Sno-park.
videos.transcript:
that's the 14th annual great nordine ski
race Oh everybody's pretty tight-knit
you know it's such a fun sport it's a
lifelong sport some people come to it
late in life and just become passionate
about it some people have done it their
whole lives grew up doing it it's one of
those sports people do with friends it's
great exercise it's good for your heart
you see a lot of folks that run and
cycle in the summer use a nordic skiing
just to stay fit throughout the winter I
was out on the course all day yesterday
setting setting things up and it's so
neat to be able to ski these Forest
Service trails and have them groomed
once a year for this race and it's just
it's a beautiful ski so it's really
fortunate that mother nature cooperated
this year and we can have a ski race on
these trails the big thing is is is it's
it's trails that they don't normally get
to ski the snowmobile club here in town
is great working with us helping prep
them and also closing the trails to
snowmobiles for the day so the skiers
can come out and race their beautiful
trails it's it's you lose elevation and
so it sounds like it's a downhill race
but there's definitely some more
climbing than people believe but it is
definitely some of the downhills are
exceptionally fun and I think the other
thing is is it's it brings people in
from out of the area and it's kind of a
good celebration in Nordic skiing in
Central Oregon

videos.title: Mt Bachelor | Nordic Center
videos.description: Drone footage shot for the Nordic Center at Mt Bachelor

videos.title: On The Trails At The Nordic Center
videos.description:
Just across the West Village parking lot lies the Mt Bachelor Nordic Center, home to 56 kilometers of groomed skate and classic trails, snowshoe routes, and some exceptionally tasty burritos! Cruise along with groomer Rion O’Grady and see what goes into making these trails so special.
::
VC: @jonathonchandler
Groomer/Skier: @rionmog
videos.transcript:
as a lifelong nordic skier I'm always
trying to look out the rear window and
make sure that I'm leaving the best
conditions that I can possibly do on a
given day we're out here grooming seven
nights a week with at least one cat if
not two depending on conditions and
working on 56 kilometres of trails
winters in the Pacific Northwest can
have some pretty wild fluctuations a few
days ago is 45 and raining and this
morning we're at about zero degrees so
just adapting and being flexible with
conditions is important
at the end of the shift there's no
greater joy than grabbing my skis and
going testing out all the trails that
I've worked on all night

videos.title: Mt. Bachelor Bend, OR Nordic SKate Ski
videos.description: I encourage you to play around on their course. It's a fun run down. A couple winding loops at the bottom of rolling hills. Medium difficulty 15k. All groomed that morning. Enjoy! I'll think about a GoPro.

videos.title: A Pre-Race Day and Workout
videos.description:
Ian Torchia has joined CXC Academy this season as a guest coach and advisor. In his weekly videos he will be sharing his thoughts on training, technique and recovery ideas. 

If you want to learn more from our great coaches visit www.cxcacademy.com.
videos.transcript:
hey everyone ian tertia here with cxc
academy
and today we are going through a
pre-race day and on pre-race day
um it normally involves testing some
skis today it's we're testing for ski
athlon so we're doing classic and skate
but figuring out which ski runs best
when they're zeroed out
with the same wax on them and then a
pre-race workout generally involves
a little bit of l3 um medium tempo
and then l4 or something harder and then
maybe some speeds thrown on the end
some people like to do it in intervals
and today we're going to be doing it
continuously two and a half k classic
l3 and then two and a half k skate
um moving into l4 practicing the
transition so
um it's really important on previous day
to
both simultaneously keep it chill but
also wake up your body with some short
efforts um
yeah i'll show you some video of our
previous workout and i hope that
this finds you on some races coming up
